code.description: The shipping option code, as provided by the [Shipping options API](/api/v3/shipping-options/return-a-list-of-available-shipping-options).

collo_count.description: The number of collos this return consists of

parcel_items.description: List of items contained in this return. Required outside the EU.

send_tracking_emails.description: When `true`, Sendcloud will send out the default track and trace emails

brand_id.description: The ID of the brand this Return belongs to.

label_url.description: URL to download the label. This can be `null` because it might not be announced yet. **Deprecated** in favour of the `label` field.

label.description: URLs to download the label, if the parcel has been announced.

normal_printer.description: URLs to download the label as an A4 PDF. The array always contains 4 identical URLs for backward compatibility with the v2 positional label layout.

label_printer.description: URL to download the label as an A6 PDF

insurance.description: Whether the return parcel is insured

tracking_number.description: This can be null because it might not be announced yet.

tracking_url.description: URL to track your return. This can be null because it might not be announced yet.

is_cancellable.description: Whether the incoming parcel of this return can be cancelled

status_history.description: List with the timeline of your return status

created_at.description: Date and time of creation of this return

delivered_at.description: A unix timestamp indicating the delivery time of this return. **Deprecated** in favour of the `delivered_at_iso` field.

delivered_at_iso.description: Date and time of delivery of this return

return_fee.description: The fee associated with this return

order_number.description: Order number filled by the user

contract.description: ID of the contract used to ship this return

customs_shipment_type.description:
Customs shipment type
  * `0` - Gift
  * `1` - Documents
  * `2` - Commercial Goods
  * `3` - Commercial Sample
  * `4` - Returned Goods

images.description: Images uploaded when creating a return via the Return Portal

product_id.description: The ID of the product that this image is related to.

uploaded_image.description: The temporary publicly-accessible URL of the originally uploaded image

thumbnail_image.description: The temporary publicly-accessible URL of the image thumbnail

description.example: My broken camera, with a crack on the lens
description.description: A description of the uploaded image

status.description: The current status of the return

errors.description: This array will contain errors such as carrier announcement errors.
